repair_tests.expected_failure: ps --json reports runtime_state_invalid with config context when state JSON is corrupt
repair_tests.failure_detail: payload.configPath was undefined for config-resolved runtime_state_invalid.

concerns: New regression confirms the current implementation omits configPath for config-resolved runtime_state_invalid responses.
recovery_hints: T026 should wrap ps --json runtime_state_invalid failure responses with config context so payload.configPath equals <projectRoot>/.launchdeck.yml.
expected_red_before_repair: The corrupt .launchdeck/runtime/state.json regression fails before T026 because payload.configPath is undefined while projectRoot, command=ps, status=error, ok=false, and error.code=runtime_state_invalid are present.
real_entrypoint_evidence: Ran real CLI smoke and managed lifecycle tests through node --test test/cli.test.js test/managed-cli.test.js. Legacy lifecycle smoke now passes with task_already_running, logs task/logPath/content, and stop process.status=stopped. Combined suite is red only on the new configPath regression.
